title: Portals Control
description: Control teleportation through Nether and End portals for players and entities
body:
## PortalsControl 
lightweight plugin that gives you full control over portal teleportation on your server  
With it, you can easily enable or disable teleportation through the Nether or End portals for players and entities

### Commands
**/portalscontrol end on/off** - enable/disable teleportation to the End  
**/portalscontrol nether on/off** - enable/disable teleportation to the Nether  
**/portalscontrol world on/off** - enable/disable teleportation to the Overworld  
**/portalscontrol reload** - Reload plugin configuration  

### Permissions
portalscontrol.command (default: op) - access to command /portalscontrol  
portalscontrol.reload (default: op) - access to subcommand /portalscontrol reload  

portalscontrol.bypass.world (default: false) - bypass teleport restriction to the Overworld  
portalscontrol.bypass.nether (default: false) - bypass teleport restriction to the Nether  
portalscontrol.bypass.end (default: false)    - bypass teleport restriction to the End  

portalscontrol.block.world (default: false)  - restricts teleport to the Overworld  
portalscontrol.block.nether (default: false) - restricts teleport to the Nether  
portalscontrol.block.end (default: false)    - restricts teleport to the End
